requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Lebanon has no confirmed official EV-connector mandate published as a single national EVSE rule, but IEC-aligned equipment expectations should be assumed for internationally compatible deployments. AC charging should be specified with IEC 62196-2 Type 2 where European / IEC vehicles and charge points are targeted. DC charging should be specified with IEC 62196-3 Combined Charging System Combo 2 (CCS2) where mainstream IEC / European DC fast-charging interoperability is required. Connector choice becomes mandatory when written into LIBNOR-adopted standards, importer specifications, site-owner requirements, tender documents, charge-point-operator rules, or insurer requirements.
summary.zh: 未能确认黎巴嫩已发布单一全国性EVSE接口强制规则，但面向国际兼容部署时应按IEC体系设备预期处理。若目标为欧洲/IEC车辆和充电点，交流充电应指定IEC 62196-2 Type 2。若需要主流IEC/欧洲直流快充互操作，直流充电应指定IEC 62196-3联合充电系统Combo 2（CCS2）。当接口要求写入LIBNOR采纳标准、进口商规范、场地方要求、招标文件、充电点运营商规则或保险要求时，即成为项目强制要求。
summary.zht: 未能確認黎巴嫩已發布單一全國性EVSE接口強制規則，但面向國際相容部署時應按IEC體系設備預期處理。若目標為歐洲/IEC車輛和充電點，交流充電應指定IEC 62196-2 Type 2。若需要主流IEC/歐洲直流快充互操作，直流充電應指定IEC 62196-3聯合充電系統Combo 2（CCS2）。當接口要求寫入LIBNOR採納標準、進口商規範、場地方要求、招標文件、充電點運營商規則或保險要求時，即成為項目強制要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — AC pin and contact-tube accessories including Type 2
IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers including CCS2 / configuration FF
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T AC couplers are not a plug-compatible replacement for IEC 62196 Type 2 because connector gender, proximity / control signaling, contact arrangement, and conformity evidence differ. GB/T DC couplers and GB/T 27930 CAN communication are not compatible with CCS2 connector geometry or the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication ecosystem commonly associated with CCS2 deployments.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流耦合器不能作为IEC 62196 Type 2的插接兼容替代品，因为接口性别、接近/控制信号、触点排列和合规证据均不同。GB/T直流耦合器及GB/T 27930 CAN通信与CCS2接口几何形状及CCS2部署常见的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信体系不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流耦合器不能作為IEC 62196 Type 2的插接相容替代品，因為接口性別、接近/控制信號、觸點排列和合規證據均不同。GB/T直流耦合器及GB/T 27930 CAN通訊與CCS2接口幾何形狀及CCS2部署常見的IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊體系不相容。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 Lebanon deployments. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, labels, spare parts, temperature-rise evidence, and DC communication stack. For DC products, GB/T 27930 must be replaced or supplemented by the CCS2 communication architecture required by the project. Adapters should not be treated as a substitute for a project-compliant connector design.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于黎巴嫩IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2部署。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、标签、备件、温升证据及直流通信栈进行硬件重新设计。对于直流产品，GB/T 27930必须由项目要求的CCS2通信架构替代或补充。转接器不应视为项目合规接口设计的替代方案。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於黎巴嫩IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2部署。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、標籤、備件、溫升證據及直流通訊棧進行硬體重新設計。對於直流產品，GB/T 27930必須由項目要求的CCS2通訊架構替代或補充。轉接器不應視為項目合規接口設計的替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by LIBNOR-adopted standards, importer, CPO, tender, project owner, vehicle fleet, or insurer; physical incompatibility with GB/T makes substitution impossible without redesign
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. GB/T connector chargers need IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2 hardware for Lebanon projects that specify IEC-compatible charging, and GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets and vice versa.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。对于指定IEC兼容充电的黎巴嫩项目，GB/T接口充电桩需要改为IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2硬件；GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口，反之亦然。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。對於指定IEC相容充電的黎巴嫩項目，GB/T接口充電樁需要改為IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2硬體；GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口，反之亦然。
